# terrible_check_point_mgmt_cp_mgmt_threat_exception (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the exception.

### Optional

- `action` (String) Action-the enforced profile.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `comments` (String) Comments string.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `destination` (String) Collection of Network objects identified by the name or UID.
- `destination_negate` (Boolean) True if negate is set for destination.
- `details_level` (String) The level of detail for some of the fields in the response can vary from showing only the UID value of the object to a fully detailed representation of the object.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable/Disable the rule.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `exception_group_name` (String) The name of the exception-group.
- `exception_group_uid` (String) The UID of the exception-group.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ignore_warnings` (Boolean) Apply changes ignoring warnings.
- `install_on` (String) Which Gateways identified by the name or UID to install the policy on.
- `layer` (String) Layer that the rule belongs to identified by the name or UID.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `position` (String) Position in the rulebase. The use of values "top" and "bottom" may not be idempotent.
- `protected_scope` (String) Collection of objects defining Protected Scope identified by the name or UID.
- `protected_scope_negate` (Boolean) True if negate is set for Protected Scope.
- `protection_or_site` (String) Name of the protection or site.
- `rule_name` (String) The name of the parent rule.
- `service` (String) Collection of Network objects identified by the name or UID.
- `service_negate` (Boolean) True if negate is set for Service.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `source` (String) Collection of Network objects identified by the name or UID.
- `source_negate` (Boolean) True if negate is set for source.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `track` (String) Packet tracking.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `cp_mgmt_threat_exception` (String) The checkpoint object created or updated.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
